description: Mexican drug cartel and organized crime syndicate based in Michoacán, founded in the 1980s by Carlos Rosales Mendoza. Known for producing large amounts of methamphetamine. Originally allied with the Gulf Cartel and Los Zetas, it split off in 2006. After the death of leader Nazario Moreno González, several factions split to form the Knights Templar Cartel and La Nueva Familia Michoacana.

country_links.evidence_quote: used the port city of Lázaro Cárdenas, Michoacán to import narcotics from Peru and Colombia
country_links.context: La Familia Michoacana imports narcotics from Colombia.
